nasb.text: then you shall do to him just as he had intended to do to his brother. Thus you shall purge the evil from among you.

esv.text: then you shall do to him as he had meant to do to his brother. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.

cnv.text: 你們就要像他想怎樣對待自己的兄弟一樣對待他，這樣，你就把那惡從你們中間除掉。

ccb.text: 就要按照他企图加给被诬告者的伤害处罚他。这样，就从你们当中除掉了罪恶。
